arts.ttl: Manager being ‘considered again’ by Manchester City – Will need convincing to succeed Guardiola
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen manager Xabi Alonso would be in the running for the Manchester City job, if Pep Guardiola decides to step away. That’s according to SportBILD, who say the Spanish boss would however need majorly convincing to take up the role. arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Man City Premier League clash simulated as three-game streak predicted
arts.sum: A 4-1 win against Ipswich Town saw Spurs pick up two Premier League wins in a row for the first time since September on the weekend, with Ange Postecoglou's side starting to look themselves again with a few players returning from injury. Tottenham will be looking to pick up a third win of the season against Manchester City when the two sides meet in the Premier League later today.

The Uruguay international has been a regular under Ange Postecoglou when available for selection.
